name: Adelpha Console Table with Sliding Doors Natural - Threshold™: Rubberwood Frame, Ash Veneer, Entryway Storage
description:
Accent your home with the mid-century modern charm of the Adelpha Console Table with Sliding Doors from Threshold™. This small-profile console table is designed with retro-style sliding doors and angled legs for statement style. Crafted from wood, this natural-finish console table comes with two storage spaces inside to help you stash away small items. Simply place it behind a sofa or against any wall for space-saving display and extra storage space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
